sentences.arabic: تُعَبِّرُ الْأَمْثَالُ الشَّعْبِيَّةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ عَنْ حِكْمَةِ الْأَجْدَادِ وَتُلَخِّصُ تَجَارِبَ الْحَيَاةِ فِي صِيَغٍ مَوْجَزَةٍ وَبَلِيغَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapske narodne poslovice izražavaju mudrost predaka i sažimaju životna iskustva u konciznim i rječitim formama.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic folk proverbs express the wisdom of ancestors and summarise life's experiences in concise and eloquent formulas.
